mapper.select:
SELECT TRUNK_ID AS trunkId, TRUNK_NAME AS trunkName, ROUTENUM AS routenum, SYSNAME AS sysname , UP_PTPNAME_BAU AS upPtpnameBau, UP_PTPNAME_PAU AS upPtpnamePau , DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU AS downPtpnameBau, DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU AS downPtpnamePau , DIRECTION as direction FROM ( SELECT TRUNK_ID, TRUNK_NAME, ROUTENUM, SYSNAME , UP_PTPNAME_BAU, UP_PTPNAME_PAU , DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU, DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU
, CASE WHEN 'ROADM' = #{roadmCode} AND ROUTENUM = 0 AND UP_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'UP' WHEN 'ROADM' = #{roadmCode} AND ROUTENUM = 0 AND DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'DOWN' WHEN 'ROADM' = #{roadmCode} AND ROUTENUM = 10 AND UP_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'UP' WHEN 'ROADM' = #{roadmCode} AND ROUTENUM = 10 AND DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'DOWN' WHEN 'REPEATER' = #{roadmCode} AND UP_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} OR UP_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'UP' WHEN 'REPEATER' = #{roadmCode} AND DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} OR DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname} THEN 'DOWN' END AS DIRECTION FROM NIA.TB_ROADM_TRUNK_REPEATER WHERE SYSNAME = #{sysname} ) A WHERE DIRECTION IS NOT NULL
